basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) Deputy Director Notification 2026 has been released on 8 July 2026 on the official website of the National Institute of Technology Warangal (https://www.nitw.ac.in). A total of 1 Deputy Director vacancy has been announced through the NIT Warangal Deputy Director Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: Not exceeding 60 years as on the closing date of submission of applications.

qualification.details: Must be a serving Professor of NIT Warangal. Minimum of 05 years of experience as Professor. Adequate administrative experience, preferably having served as Head of Department (HoD)/Dean for a minimum period of 02 years. Significant contribution in academics, administration, research, institutional development, and outreach activities. Eminent academician in his/her field of specialization with an outstanding academic record.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Warangal Deputy Director Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Warangal to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NIT Warangal Deputy Director Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Warangal Deputy Director Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 - Overview
NIT Warangal Deputy Director Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Warangal Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIT Warangal Deputy Director Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Deputy Director Vacancy Details 2026
NIT Warangal Deputy Director Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Must be a serving Professor of NIT Warangal. Minimum of 05 years of experience as Professor. Adequate administrative experience, preferably having served as Head of Department (HoD)/Dean for a minimum period of 02 years. Significant contribution in academics, administration, research, institutional development, and outreach activities. Eminent academician in his/her field of specialization with an outstanding academic record.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Deputy Director Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: Not exceeding 60 years as on the closing date of submission of applications.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Warangal Deputy Director Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Warangal to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Warangal DEPUTY DIRECTOR recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the DEPUTY DIRECTOR post at NIT Warangal is 07-08-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the age limit for the DEPUTY DIRECTOR position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the DEPUTY DIRECTOR post is not exceeding 60 years as on the closing date of application submission.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be serving Professors of NIT Warangal with a minimum of 5 years of experience as Professor and 2 years of administrative experience as HoD/Dean.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the DEPUTY DIRECTOR job at NIT Warangal?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates need to apply online through the official recruitment portal of NIT Warangal before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the DEPUTY DIRECTOR post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Deputy Director at NIT Warangal.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website for NIT Warangal recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for NIT Warangal recruitment is https://Recruit.nitw.ac.in/.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a Full Time job opportunity.

faq.question: Q9. In which state is NIT Warangal located?
faq.answer: NIT Warangal is located in Warangal, Telangana.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 02/2026.
